RULING:
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF

No argument made and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion for preference is granted pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). No opposition filed. Trial is November 12, 2014 at 11:15am in Department 503. Last day for trial is November 14, 2014. Last day for hearing summary judgment/adjudication motions is November 5, 2014. Summary judgment/adjudication motions shall be brought on regular notice dictated by the C.C.P. For any written discovery already served, responses are due 20 days from this this hearing or within the time dictated by the C.C.P., whichever is earlier. For any written discovery served on or after the date of this hearing, the time to respond is shortened to 20 days. If there is any kind of issue/dispute that requires meet and confer, such meet and confer shall not be made via email or letter. It shall occur in person or via telephone. Plaintiff to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than September 12, 2014. Responses to the demand are due no later than September 19, 2014. Settlement conference in room 603 at 1:30pm on November 5, 2014. Fact discovery cut-off date is October 24, 2014. Expert discovery cut-off date is November 7, 2014. No later than July 31, 2014 plaintiff must provide a statement stating, as to each defendant, the name and contact information of each lay person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of plaintiff's claims. No later than July 31, 2014 defendants must provide a statement stating the name and contact information of each lay person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of defendant's affirmative defenses. Any person not identified on the statements will be barred from testifying at trial or presenting a declaration on a summary motion absent good cause shown. Further case management conference on September 25, 2014 at 1:30pm. No need for any party to file any case management conference statement. Parties may appear at the conference by telephone. There will be a mandatory settlement conference with the court pursuant to San Francisco Local Rules of Court Rule 5 on November 12, 2014 at 1:30p.m. in Department 503.
